productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Black White Metallic Flip Flop
description: CompositionBlack, white and metallic silver slides with adjustable upper made of PU bandage and stand lining, EVA outsole and TPR massage footbed Wash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washA perfect footwear for your tired feet after an exercise regime, these slides from adidas have a TPR massage footbed that relaxe the feet, and in turn the whole body. The adjustable PU bandage with stand lining gives a customized Fit and ensures the feet are well supported on the top, while the injected EVA in the outsole means lightweight comfort.
